## Safety and privacy

- [ ] Report mode remains read-only apart from documented local logs and backups.
- [ ] Maintenance mutations remain explicit and documented.
- [ ] No credentials, personal identifiers, hostnames, environment names, absolute workstation paths, or unredacted reports are included.
- [ ] New logs, configuration, or network behavior is documented.
- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior and its failure boundary.
